description_long: This is a rugged outdoor hiking shoe featuring a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays in earthy brown and beige tones. The upper is reinforced with durable stitching and multiple textured panels for breathability and support. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The lacing system uses a standard criss-cross pattern with round, two-tone laces threaded through metal eyelets. The midsole appears cushioned for shock absorption, while the outsole is thick and lugged for enhanced traction on uneven terrain. A small geometric logo is visible on the side and heel, indicating a recognizable outdoor brand.
description: A rugged brown and beige hiking shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, criss-cross lacing, and a lugged sole for outdoor traction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, mesh upper, reinforced overlays, and criss-cross lacing with padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered mesh and synthetic panels, geometric logo, and thick, textured sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar, pull tab, and a logo on the heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the shoe's structural overlays, mesh ventilation, and the aggressive tread of the outsole.
attribute_logo: Diamond-shaped geometric logo on the side and heel, white in color.
